loop1.title: Transfer readiness
loop1.note: This UPS asset does not measure transfer readiness scores, permissive states, or bypass voltages; the card's core readiness metrics are absent and cannot be derived from available electrical columns.

loop1.title: Activity
loop1.note: Showing transfer activity volume and timing — derived from auto-restart counts; exact transfer-specific columns are not logged for this asset.

loop1.title: Source Transfer — Composite
loop1.note: Showing bypass frequency and input voltage — composite transfer readiness score and transfer event count are not directly measured by this UPS asset's schema, so those slots are omitted.

loop2: 'ups-asset-dashboard/source-transfer' answers the prompt as routed; these cards cover quantities not recorded for this asset and render honest-blank per-leaf with the reason: Transfer readiness (This UPS asset does not measure transfer readiness scores, permissive states, or bypass voltages; the card's core readiness metrics are absent and cannot be derived from available electrical columns.).
